content: Update Home.js - Add Reveal animations to all sections, enhance Hero CTAs with metallic effects, convert hard-coded accent colors to theme variables
Update WorkWithMe.js - Add clear CTAs to each service tier, add Reveal animations, theme variables
Update Tools.js - Convert hard-coded accent colors to theme variables, add Reveal animations to tool sections
Update Work.js - Add CTAs to project cards, Reveal animations, theme variables
Update About.js, Contact.js, Notes.js, NoteDetail.js - Add Reveal animations to all major sections
Test all pages with theme switching, search functionality, breadcrumbs, and animations
Test search with Cmd+K, verify it finds and navigates to all content types
